questions.question: 2 (a) A student determines the volume of a piece of metal. The student pours 30 cm 3 of water into a measuring cylinder. The piece of metal is submerged in the water and the new volume reading on the measuring cylinder is 42 cm 3 . Calculate the volume of the piece of metal. volume = .................................................. cm 3 [1] (b)
